subcodes.title: Words at reception with Turkish Ambassador, spoken on 1912-04-23
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! The dark ages have passed away, and the illumined century hath dawned. Minds and souls are advancing, and understanding is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله قرون تاریک گذشت قرن نورانی آمد عقول و نفوس در ترقی است ادراکات در
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @universal peace; world unity, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @equality of men and women, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action
